choose.when: SELECT EDI_EXPT_GDS_NM AS GOODS_NAME, TO_CHAR(EDI_DCLR_QTY, 'FM999,999,999') AS TOTAL_QTY, TO_CHAR(EDI_NET_WT, 'FM999,999,999.000') AS TOTAL_WEIGHT FROM EXP_DCLR_ITEM WHERE EDI_ER_NO = #{reqNo} ORDER BY EDI_SN
choose.otherwise: SELECT IDI_DCLR_GDSNM AS GOODS_NAME, TO_CHAR(IDI_QTY, 'FM999,999,999') AS TOTAL_QTY, TO_CHAR(IDI_NET_WT, 'FM999,999,999.000') AS TOTAL_WEIGHT FROM IMP_DCLR_ITEM WHERE IDI_IR_NO = #{reqNo} ORDER BY IDI_SN
